title: phyllorkis clavigera
intro: Phyllorkis clavigera, also known as the Himalayan orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllorkis clavigera include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of powder, decoction, or infusion, and is traditionally consumed as a tea or added to other herbal remedies.
